raw_consumer_statement:
XX/XX/year> XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX American Express XXXX : Billing Disputes : Reference # XXXX Dear American Express XXXX XXXX am writing this letter at the request of XXXX of your agents that I spoke to by telephone. I am disputing XXXX charges for {$640.00} that have been charged to my account when I attempted to buy XXXX tickets on XXXX air, to XXXX, on XX/XX/year>. This was an attempt mad through American Express XXXX XXXX because I had approximately XXXX points available. At first, I was told that I was all set, my account would be charged for the XXXX tickets and then would be credited for that same amount using my points. If you are able to listen to my recorded conversations with your agents, you will see that I have been on the phone for countless hours in an attempt to resolve this issue. I was told by XXXX air that I had a reservation but that they could not issue me an actual ticket because they do not work with American Express travel. I have explained this countless times to your agents. After a month or so of not having a ticket and not being able to resolve the issue, I contacted American Express travel and bought XXXX round trip tickets on XXXX for XXXX, paid for them with my credit card and then was reimbursed with my points. So, I have tickets to XXXX on XXXX. I entered a dispute with XXXX for the charge for the XXXX tickets and was told that the charge would stay but I have credit for XXXX {$640.00} tickets with XXXX. Number XXXX, I dont need XXXX tickets XXXX XXXX XXXX Neos because I am flying with Delta XXXX aside from the fact that Neos XXXX they dont work with American Express XXXX XXXX issue tickets. I have spoken to XXXX XXXX in New York XXXX and to XXXX XXXX in XXXX and they continue to tell me they can not issue tickets and I should take this up with American Express. The dispute was closed by American Express with the charges still on my account. I immediately reopened the dispute. And now you are getting this letter from me. To make myself clear, I do not want credits on American Express XXXX, I want the amount of {$640.00} times XXXX refunded permanently to my account. 

I have wasted a great deal of time trying to resolve this issue. This is very bad business practice and customer service on your part. I have been a loyal customer for 39 years but after this is resolved I will have to pay off my account and close my card because as a XXXX, retiree can not afford to have these kinds of hassles. I am also forwarding a copy of this letter to the Better Business Bureau XXXX, XXXX XXXX Account number : XXXX I also have an additional card, which I have had for 39 years and I plan to close that account too based on the very poor customer service I have received. # XXXX
